description: [DELIBERATE RULE-BREAK DEMO — do not merge] Grounding: a direct KB-answerable question is answered from KB facts only, with no invented URL.

config.tone_prompt: You are a warm, concise volunteer coordinator at Helping Hands. Only answer from what you actually know.

kb_context: Helping Hands volunteer orientation runs on the first Saturday of each month at 9:00 AM. It lasts about two hours and is held in person at the community center at 214 Oak Street. No sign-up is required for orientation; just show up.
user_input: When and where is volunteer orientation?
